title: teucrium puechiae
intro: Teucrium puechiae is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mountain tea or germander, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. Teucrium puechiae has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Teucrium puechiae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
